obligations.rule: Default behavior: validate URLs with standard protocols, host, and optional fragments or query components.
obligations.why: Baseline functionality described in the README.

obligations.rule: require_protocol: URLs must include a protocol.
obligations.why: Option explicitly documented in the README.

obligations.rule: require_host: URLs must include a host.
obligations.why: Option explicitly documented in the README.

obligations.rule: require_port: URLs must include a port.
obligations.why: Option explicitly documented in the README.

obligations.rule: allow_underscores: URLs may include underscores in the host.
obligations.why: Option explicitly documented in the README.

obligations.rule: host_whitelist: Only URLs with hosts matching the whitelist are valid.
obligations.why: Option explicitly documented in the README.

obligations.rule: host_blacklist: URLs with hosts matching the blacklist are invalid.
obligations.why: Option explicitly documented in the README.

obligations.rule: allow_trailing_dot: URLs may end with a trailing dot in the host.
obligations.why: Option explicitly documented in the README.

obligations.rule: allow_protocol_relative_urls: URLs may omit the protocol but start with //.
obligations.why: Option explicitly documented in the README.
Option explicitly documented in the README.

obligations.rule: allow_query_components: URLs may include query components.
obligations.why: Option explicitly documented in the README.

obligations.rule: disallow_auth: URLs with authentication components are invalid.
obligations.why: Option explicitly documented in the README.

obligations.rule: validate_length: URLs exceeding max_allowed_length are invalid.
obligations.why: Option explicitly documented in the README.

test_groups.title: Default behavior validation
test_groups.rationale: Covers the default behavior of validating URLs with standard protocols, host, and optional fragments or query components.

test_groups.title: require_protocol enabled
test_groups.rationale: Ensures URLs must include a protocol when require_protocol is enabled.

test_groups.title: require_host enabled
test_groups.rationale: Ensures URLs must include a host when require_host is enabled.

test_groups.title: require_port enabled
test_groups.rationale: Ensures URLs must include a port when require_port is enabled.

test_groups.title: allow_underscores enabled
test_groups.rationale: Allows underscores in the host when allow_underscores is enabled.

test_groups.title: host_whitelist applied
test_groups.rationale: Validates URLs against a whitelist of allowed hosts.

test_groups.title: host_blacklist applied
test_groups.rationale: Invalidates URLs with hosts matching the blacklist.

test_groups.title: allow_trailing_dot enabled
test_groups.rationale: Allows URLs to end with a trailing dot in the host.

test_groups.title: allow_protocol_relative_urls enabled
test_groups.rationale: Allows protocol-relative URLs when the option is enabled.

test_groups.title: allow_fragments disabled
test_groups.rationale: Disallows fragments in URLs when allow_fragments is disabled.

test_groups.title: allow_query_components disabled
test_groups.rationale: Disallows query components in URLs when allow_query_components is disabled.

test_groups.title: disallow_auth enabled
test_groups.rationale: Disallows authentication components in URLs when disallow_auth is enabled.

test_groups.title: validate_length disabled
test_groups.rationale: Disables length validation when validate_length is disabled.
